authority: Health Quality and Safety Commission (HQSC) Te Tāhū Hauora
list_name: Aotearoa New Zealand Tall Man Lettering List
licence_notes: Licence not stated on the HQSC download page. Confirm with HQSC before publishing this archived copy. The xlsx is used as a cross-check against the manually transcribed CSV.
monitoring: Check annually. October 2023 is the most recent update. The October 2023 revision removed PHENOXYMETHylpenicillin; list now contains 224 medicine names.
notes: New Zealand is the only national authority to provide native machine-readable downloads (PDF + xlsx). Recommended for NZULM (NZ Universal List of Medicines) data downloads and for smart pump drug libraries. HQSC explicitly limits list size to prevent over-use diluting the technique's effectiveness.
